corrections.correction: Event name links in events listing open in a new tab (target=_blank). Use page.goto(href) instead of click.
Events listing status filters (All, Accepting registrations, Draft, Completed, Archived) are buttons, not tabs. Use getByRole('button') scoped to .events-listing-table.
Scope all events table interactions to .events-listing-table to avoid strict mode violations from other page links.
Filters modal selector is .events-listing-filter:visible; apply button is .apply-filters-btn (not role dialog or 'Apply filters' button name in all builds).
Registration type filter checkboxes are named exactly: Open, Moderated, Invite only. Use getByRole('checkbox', { name, exact: true }).
corrections.context: Events listing — filters modal registration type

corrections.correction: Tags dropdown in filters modal: click .ant-select-selector inside the Tags form item, not getByLabel('Tags') — placeholder intercepts clicks.
Do not press Escape to close tag dropdown — it dismisses the entire filters modal. Click elsewhere in modal instead.
Row Actions menu: hover the Actions text in the row, then click the item in .events-listing-action-dropdown.

To verify registration type in event editor: use getByRole('combobox', { name: 'How would you like to manage registrations?' }) and assert .ant-select-selection-item text. Do NOT use #event-admin-form-container or .ant-form-item hasText.
corrections.context: Events editor — TC_EV_003 registration type verification

corrections.correction: Filter label 'Invite only' maps to editor dropdown value 'Invite-only' (with hyphen).
